title: Work
description: Use this area for delivery-facing work, active responsibilities, and outcomes that should ship.
focus: Pick the most important active stream, define the next shippable move, and record the decision in the note.
prompts: Based on 20_Areas/Work and 10_Projects, identify the highest-leverage next step and rewrite it as a shippable action.
Review the current work note and highlight what is blocked, what is moving, and what should be deferred.
Turn the current project context into a concise weekly brief with one owner, one deliverable, and one next action.
checkpoints: Every active project has a clear next action.
Important work is backed by a durable project note.
Finished work is rewritten into reusable knowledge or achievements.

nextActions.text: Write the next shippable step in plain language.
Link the project back to Work so the context stays visible.
